metadata.description: Autonomous experimentation engine for AI engineering decisions — runs as a Claude Code skill.

plugins.name: auto-itera
plugins.description: Define a goal + candidates + threshold; auto-itera autonomously sources real production data, scores arms in parallel, sprint-iterates with a generalization gate, and writes a one-page conclusion doc with three publication-quality charts. 22 explicit safeguards against eval self-deception.
